name: design-critique
description: Audit a UI across six evaluation lanes — WCAG 2.2 accessibility, Nielsen heuristics, cognitive load, affordances/conventions (HIG, Jakob's Law, Norman), visual hierarchy (Refactoring UI, Gestalt), and color/design-systems — each backed by an itemized reference checklist. Fans the lanes out to parallel sub-agents (fusion-style panel) and produces a prioritized improvement plan with severity-rated findings (P1–P4) and before/after fixes.
